data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplified user interface to reduce decision time for users.
data.technical_spec: Focused layout with essential features like chat and status prominently displayed.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Optimizes interaction elements for fast navigation.
data.technical_spec: Large, tappable areas for message reply and sending buttons.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related information and controls for intuitive access.
data.technical_spec: Chats and related media content are visually grouped together.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Simplifies information to prevent cognitive overload in messaging.
data.technical_spec: Uses concise labels and icons to streamline user interaction.

data.title: Pareto Principle (80/20 Rule)
data.description: Focus on major user functions for high efficiency.
data.technical_spec: Emphasizes messaging and media sharing, the app's core functionalities.
